content.en:
"True Martial Palace Master, what do you Heavenly Emperor Palace want to do?"

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor asked in a cold voice.

"Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, can't you guess?" asked the True Martial Palace Master rhetorically.

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor sighed: "It's too cruel for you to do this, in that case, how many people will die?"

The True Martial Palace Lord laughed and said, "Since you guessed it, why don't you stop it? Don't pretend to be noble, isn't this matter also beneficial to you? If it weren't for the fall of the invincible Dao Ancestor in your sect this time, I'm afraid you wouldn't have come out." For you, the invincible Dao Ancestor is the foundation of the sect, and everyone else can be discarded! We are all the same kind of people, there is no difference!"

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor did not refute, was silent for a while, and then said: "True Martial Palace Master, this matter is here, how about it?"

"Yes!"

The True Martial Palace Master nodded.

Now that countless True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors have fallen, he has killed three more Invincible Dao Ancestors, and he has already completed the target, so it is not possible to end it here, otherwise he has really done too much, I am afraid that more than the Dao Ancestor of the Town Domain will attack him.

"That Ancient Mirror Forbidden Treasure is also placed by your Heavenly Emperor Palace, right? Please take it, otherwise there will be a large number of forces fighting for it!"

Zhenyu Daozu hurriedly said.

"That's right, that thing is called the Haotian Emperor Mirror, and it is indeed a thing of our Heavenly Emperor Palace, then I will take it!"

The True Martial Palace Master did not hide it at all, after all, there was no need to hide it.

Wow!

The True Martial Palace Lord left, came to the place where the Haotian Emperor Mirror was, and easily took away the Haotian Emperor Mirror that others couldn't take, and then the whole person disappeared.

......

"Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, the Heavenly Emperor Palace is too much!"

Tianyang Dao Ancestor dragged his seriously injured body.

"Then what should we do, can we still fight against the Heavenly Emperor Palace?" Zhenyu Dao Ancestor sighed: "The three palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace are very strong, especially the Qinglong Palace Master, who can be called the first half-step domain ancestor in the vast sea realm, and his strength is unfathomable. Moreover, the Heavenly Emperor Palace has a large number of emperors, and even some ancient emperors can break into the half-step domain ancestor realm at any time, and the gap between our strength and the Heavenly Emperor Palace is too big!"

Tianyang Daozu was silent, and his strength was weak and could only be beaten.

If they really confront the Heavenly Emperor Palace, their Ten Thousand Domains Temple would probably be destroyed in an instant.

"That's all for this matter, you don't have to feel a pity, that Haotian Emperor Mirror can't evolve the Domain Ancestor Path at all!"

Zhenyu Daozu Road.

"Got it!"

Several Invincible Dao Ancestors nodded one after another.

If he could really evolve the Domain Ancestor Path, I am afraid that the Zhenyu Dao Ancestor would have to slaughter a large number of Dao Ancestors frantically.

"In addition, the grievances between our Ten Thousand Domains Divine Temple and your Mitian Sect and Tianhai Sect are over, no matter how many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors we have fought between us, try not to fight again in the future, the Heavenly Emperor Palace is now exposed, which means that the dead True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors are almost satisfied with their plans. "

The Zhenyu Dao Ancestor looked at the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor and the invincible Dao Ancestors of the Tianhai Sect and the Mitian Sect, seeking their opinions.

"Zhenyu Dao Ancestor, I don't have any opinions!"

Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor was the first to speak.

The invincible Dao Ancestors of the Heavenly Sea Sect and the Mitian Sect also bent down and said, "We also agree to reconcile, after all, this is a conspiracy of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, which led us to fight each other!"

"Then leave!"

Zhenyu Dao Ancestor left with Tianyang Dao Ancestor and Half Moon Dao Ancestor one after another.

The Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor also turned around and left, and the invincible Dao Ancestors of the Tianhai Sect and the Mitian Sect did not stop the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor.

After all, there is no point in fighting at this time, there is no benefit at all.

In this way, the invincible Dao Ancestors left one after another.

--------------

The other side.

Ouyang Jiu'er and Ye Tian knew that after the battle was over, they wanted to go to the Haotian Emperor Mirror to take a look, but they looked from afar, only to find that the regular cloud above Hulu Mountain had disappeared.

"It's a pity, the Haotian Emperor Mirror has been taken away, it seems that the plan of the Heavenly Emperor Palace this time has come to an end!"

Ouyang Jiu'er said regretfully.

She had wanted to get a second glimpse of what lay ahead.

She also knew that the Haotian Emperor Mirror could not evolve the path of the Domain Ancestor, but after all, the path she took in this life was different from the previous life, although she became a half-step Domain Ancestor in her previous life, her foundation was too weak, and she belonged to the weaker one of the Half-Step Domain Ancestors, and she had no potential to become a Domain Ancestor.

And the foundation of this life is too deep, so he wants to use the Haotian Emperor Mirror to completely evolve to the extreme of the half-step domain ancestor and walk out of an extremely perfect path.

It's a pity that she has only just evolved to the half-step domain ancestor level path, and she hasn't evolved to the extreme, so she has no chance to evolve again.

But soon, she calmed down.

In short, this time the harvest is very big.

Ye Tian also regretted it for a while, but it didn't matter soon.

Immediately.

Ye Tian and Ouyang Jiu'er left the Huoyan Forbidden Land and returned to the Terran Race.

After coming back, Ye Tian sorted out the harvest this time.

One low-level taboo treasure, 32 top-level taboo oddities, 925 high-level taboo oddities, 15,032 medium-taboo oddities, and 356213 low-level taboo oddities.

Hundreds of thousands of forbidden and strange things, such a harvest is simply exaggerated!

Of course.

Most of the forbidden strange things were picked up by Ye Tian, and when the enemy was fighting, he followed Ouyang Jiu'er everywhere to steal corpses, so he stole many forbidden strange things.

Otherwise, Ye Tian's harvest would probably be reduced a lot.

With the passage of time, after the Huoyan Forbidden Land was no longer dangerous, many True Ancestors entered the Huoyan Forbidden Land again.

Of course, the forbidden strange things in Huoyan Forbidden Land were relatively rare, but Ouyang could also find one.

At this point, Huoyan has forbidden become a blessed land for ordinary True Ancestors and elite True Ancestors.

After Ye Tian came back, he began to retreat and cultivate.

This time, with the help of the Haotian Emperor Mirror, he witnessed the evolution of the future path, and personally felt those forbidden paths, and this kind of perception is still there, so if he continues to comprehend the forbidden paths, it is easy to grasp them one by one.

Originally, Ye Tian was afraid that it would take an incomparably long time to master the complete forbidden path, but now it won't take too long.

It can be seen from this how useful the Haotian Emperor Mirror is.

Of course, even if you master the complete forbidden path, it's not a big deal.

According to Ouyang Jiu'er, those ancient invincible Dao ancestors had all mastered the complete forbidden path, but they didn't all refine the complete forbidden path, they just selected a certain forbidden path to focus on.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian mastered a forbidden path every once in a while-

100 taboo ways!

A thousand forbidden ways!

Three thousand forbidden paths!

......

Unconsciously, Ye Tian finally realized all the taboo paths, although it was a preliminary comprehension, and each taboo path was far from being a beginner, but at least he had comprehended the complete taboo path, and the strength of the whole person instantly improved a lot.

Next, his goal is to complete the fusion of the Forbidden Dao and the Endless Dao to form his own Endless Forbidden Dao.
